completed_sessions.title: Python virtual environments and pip
completed_sessions.summary: Learn how to create and use Python virtual environments, install packages with pip, and manage dependencies using requirements.txt.

reflection.solution: Created venvs, installed packages, generated requirements.txt
reflection.reflection: Now understand why isolated environments are important and how pip fits into workflow

completed_sessions.title: Intro to HTTP and REST
completed_sessions.summary: Understand HTTP fundamentals including request methods, status codes, and how RESTful APIs are structured and used with JSON.

reflection.solution: Explored endpoints using curl and built simple JSON requests
reflection.reflection: Better understanding of how frontend communicates with backend via HTTP

uncompleted_sessions.title: Build a CRUD API with FastAPI
uncompleted_sessions.summary: Build a RESTful CRUD API using FastAPI, including routing, request validation, and database integration.
